title: Box update raw detail (GET /box-updates/{box_id}/raw)
description: The second-pass per-box drill-down behind box-update.raw_ref: the pending package list and known vulnerabilities. NEW contract (CONSOLE-CONTRACTS.md section 3.3: as-built row + 2nd-pass packages[]/vulns[] behind raw_ref expansion) — the as-built collector today aggregates Action1 missing-update drilldown entries ({agent_id, severity, release_date}, collector/action1.js + normalize.js) into counts only; this shape is what the raw expansion serves once the collector persists the detail. Returned as a single object, not a read-envelope page. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

box_id.description: The box this detail belongs to (box-update.box_id).

packages.description: Pending package updates on the box.

fixed_in.description: Version that fixes it; null when no fix is available yet.

collected_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — when this detail was collected from the source tool.
